text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Recording claw machine result as a "success."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was able to acquire very useful knowledge from
your determined facial expressions and hand
movements, among other things.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe this will adequately aid in "small talk."
Thank you, Trainer.
